tests.name: every scripted live action has a binding
tests.expected: Each live pitch action maps to a current endpoint, a named artifact path, or an explicit ROADMAP label.

tests.name: state-changing endpoints are integration-owned
tests.expected: The SPEC_ONLY branch documents POST /api/live-scan, POST /api/run, POST /api/install-guard, and POST /api/agent but does not call them.

tests.name: truth badges default safe
tests.expected: A capability defaults to NOT CONFIGURED or LOCAL FALLBACK unless current endpoint or artifact evidence supports LIVE.

tests.name: timing cannot be self-attested
tests.expected: three_minute_timing_pass and overall_pass stay false until three measured rehearsals with artifacts exist.

tests.name: no duplicate judge mode
tests.expected: This branch never creates UI, Shield Pill, Mode-1, Mode-2, packages/judge-mode-v2, or ui-next implementation files.
